response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in C++ at a professional scale (only mentioned in academic/volunteer context), has no clear track record in cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or infrastructure leadership, and their resume emphasizes web/mobile stacks and open-source tools rather than the core requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in software practices
Active open-source contributor with diverse technical projects
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of professional C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience with cloud compute infrastructure or large-scale distributed systems
No prior technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
